series_metadata.series_title: Motorcycle Ohio Program instructor and training provider application files
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes initial and renewal application files for Motorcycle Ohio Program (MOP) training site providers and instructors as well as surveys to improve program development. MOP0033 (2/13): MOP instructor Refresher Workshop Evaluation form; this is a survey collected at the Instructor Refresher Workshop. The survey questions are completed by the certified instructors and evaluated by the program staff and chief instructors. The survey summary is to evaluate instruction and improve instructor’s professional development. MOP0043 (11/11): Application to approve or renew a certification of approval to act as a training site provider for MOP, which includes the following documents: criminal abstract provided by the Bureau of Criminal Identification; proof of liability insurance; and Motorcycle Safety Foundation (MSF) certification for approval. MOP0044 (07/07): Application to approve or renew a certification of approval to act as an instructor for MOP, which includes the following documents: a statement affirming that applicant meets the requirements for certification to teach; criminal abstract provided by the Bureau of Criminal Identification and Investigation; current, valid first aid card and CPR card or equivalent; evidence of successful completion of an instructor preparation course and the basic rider course: applicant’s driving record, and course instruction observation and evaluation sheets; and if applicable, physician’s statement; and MSF certification.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: certification lapses, changes, or expires, three years. ; Electronic: certification lapses, changes, or expires, three years
